page: Microsoft Azure L32s_v3 is a storage-optimized virtual machine from the LSv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes hardware flags such as AVX-512, AVX512_VNNI, AES, and SHA_NI. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 8008 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. No GPUs are included.

Benchmark data shows average performance across most compute and memory metrics. The single-core stress-ng score is 1900.09, and the multi-core score is 31084.54. Memory bandwidth tests show 1680.1 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 149.6 GB/sec for large-block reads. The server demonstrates strong performance in image processing with a Geekbench score of 13633.0 and Passmark memory tests with a score of 2845.43. Small-model LLM text generation is also strong at 292.02 tokens/sec, though large-model inference is weak due to the lack of hardware acceleration.

Given the high local storage capacity of 8008 GB and 256.0 GB of RAM, the L32s_v3 offers high resource density for storage-heavy workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for applications requiring large local scratch space or high-throughput database operations without the overhead of external storage arrays. The server is suited for database hosting, large-scale data processing, static web serving, and memory-intensive applications.
description: Microsoft Azure L32s_v3 is a storage-optimized virtual machine from the LSv3 family, powered by a 32-vCPU Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 256.0 GB of RAM and 8008 GB of Premium Storage-capable local storage, with no integrated GPUs. The x86_64 architecture supports AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration. Benchmarks indicate average multi-core performance with a stress-ng score of 31084.54, alongside strong results in image processing and memory operations. The server is highly suited for database hosting, large-scale data processing, and memory-intensive applications requiring substantial local storage capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure L32s_v3 is a storage-optimized VM featuring 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 8008 GB of local storage, designed for high-capacity database and data processing workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure L32s_v3 is a storage-optimized VM with 32 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 8008 GB of local storage for database workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity storage and memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and over eight terabytes of local storage.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor at 2.8 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
8008 GB of Premium Storage-capable local storage
Strong performance in memory operations and image processing benchmarks
Optimized for database hosting, data processing, and large-scale storage workloads
